title: cardamine atlantica
intro: Cardamine atlantica, also known as the Atlantic bittercress, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cardamine atlantica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal supplements and tinctures.
